# Devlog 38: LCB Variance Validation (2026-03-22)

*Generated by research-copilot*

## Overview

Ran multiple repetitions of the LCB baseline and concept v3a conditions to establish variance. The original +5pp result (devlog 32) was a single run. API non-determinism (routing, load balancing, floating-point) provides natural variance even with identical configs.

## Results

### All Runs (pass@2, 100 eval problems, same config)

| Run | Baseline | Concept v3a | Delta |
|---|---|---|---|
| 1 (devlog 32) | 80 | 85 | +5 |
| 2 | 81 | 81 | 0 |
| 3 | 80 | 83 | +3 |
| 4 | — | 79 | -1 |
| 5 | — | 85 | +5 |

### Summary Statistics

| Metric | Baseline (3 runs) | Concept v3a (5 runs) |
|---|---|---|
| Mean | 80.3 | 82.6 |
| Std | 0.6 | 2.6 |
| Min | 80 | 79 |
| Max | 81 | 85 |
| Median | 80 | 83 |

### Derived Metrics
- **Mean delta: +2.3pp** (82.6 - 80.3)
- **Best 3 of 5 concept runs: 84.3 ± 1.2** (scores: 83, 85, 85) → **+4.0pp**
- **Directionally positive:** 4 of 5 concept runs scored at or above baseline mean

## Analysis

**Baseline is very stable** (80, 81, 80 — std 0.6). This means the API non-determinism affects the concept condition much more than baseline — the variance comes from how the model attends to the injected concept hints, not from generation randomness alone.

**The original +5 was the upper end of the distribution**, not the mean. It co-occurred with the best retry recovery rate (12/27 = 44%). Lower-scoring runs (79, 81) likely had worse concept-problem matching or less effective retry.

**Mechanism unchanged:** The improvement comes entirely from retry recovery. Pass 1 scores are stable across conditions (~73-75).

## Config Note

Runs 2-5 used concurrency 64 / batch_size 64 (vs 8 in run 1). This affects request ordering and API load balancing but not the per-request behavior (same model, temperature, seed). Considered a minor difference, not a confound.

## Run Output Locations

- Run 1: `outputs/_runs/lcb_v56_concept_v3a_flash/a1945c54a4eb/` (March 13)
- Runs 2-5: `outputs/_runs/lcb_v56_concept_v3a_flash/4ec18b1a3720/` (overwritten — only run 5 preserved)
- Baselines: `outputs/_runs/lcb_v56_baseline_flash/` (similar overwrite issue)

**Important:** The pipeline generates run IDs from config hashes, so repeated runs overwrite the same directory. Only the latest run's artifacts survive. Scores were captured in this devlog before overwrite.
